full_text:
Li Shencheng 李申成
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Shencheng (李申成). Reported Liu Xun, an old friend of Cao Cao’s, for extortion and illegal conduct in 213. Li Shencheng was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
